title: Android 17 rolls out on Pixel with Gemini Omni, improved multitasking, and gaming mode for foldables
summary: The new version of Google's operating system incorporates artificial intelligence features, floating windows, and support for Wear OS 7, as well as gaming improvements.

title: Snap finally launches its Specs augmented reality glasses at a price of $2,195
summary: Snap's smart glasses allow digital content to be overlaid on the real world and are now available for pre-order.

title: SpaceX acquires AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion
summary: Elon Musk's company seeks to strengthen its artificial intelligence capabilities to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic.

title: SpaceX debuts on stock market and reaches a valuation of $2.6 trillion
summary: Elon Musk's aerospace company begins trading on the stock market, causing changes in Starlink prices and an increase in capitalization.

title: Qualcomm introduces Snapdragon Reality Elite to lead the next generation of XR devices
summary: The company announces two new chips for smart glasses and mixed reality headsets, aiming to be the standard in wearables.

title: 60% of US consumers reject the use of 'AI' in brand marketing
summary: A survey shows that most consumers consider the mention of artificial intelligence in advertising messages to be a negative factor.

title: Rivian cuts hundreds of jobs after R2 launch on its path to profitability
summary: The electric vehicle company adjusts its workforce and seeks to reduce costs after starting deliveries of its SUV.

title: Microsoft considers integrating DeepSeek into Copilot Cowork to lower its AI costs
summary: The tech giant evaluates using the Chinese model DeepSeek V4 as an alternative to OpenAI and Anthropic in its enterprise AI service.

title: Mozilla launches Firefox 152 with renewed settings and JPEG XL support
summary: The new version of the browser includes a settings redesign, easier tab mutation, and performance improvements.

title: Wolfram Language 15 and Mathematica 15 arrive with new computational capabilities
summary: The update incorporates improvements in visualization, machine learning, and data processing for scientific users.

title: Leaked documents reveal details of the secret agreement between the US and Iran to end the war
summary: The leaks expose the negotiations and concessions of both parties to reach a ceasefire.

title: Satellites show Russia preparing to deploy 80,000 soldiers in Europe after Ukraine
summary: Satellite images indicate Russian military movements toward new positions, raising tensions on the continent.

title: Volkswagen executives warn that the company's existence is in danger
summary: The auto giant's top executives agree that the company faces an existential crisis due to market challenges.

title: Nintendo suffers leak confirming mandatory use of Copilot AI by its employees
summary: The hack reveals that since December the company has required the use of Microsoft's artificial intelligence, generating fear of replacements.

title: Intel 18A-P enters risk production with major performance and efficiency improvements
summary: The manufacturing process promises 9% more performance, 18% less energy consumption, and 40% thermal improvement.

title: Quantum computing advances in Chicago with PsiQuantum
summary: PsiQuantum accumulates successes and positions Chicago as a global quantum computing hub.

title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo to offer translation and streaming audio at live events
summary: The machine translation company buys the live audio platform to expand its real-time services.

title: UK bans social media access for under-16s starting in 2027
summary: The new law aims to protect children from the risks of digital platforms, establishing strict restrictions.

title: India orders temporary suspension of Telegram over alleged exam fraud
summary: The measure responds to complaints that the app was used to spread leaks of academic tests.

title: Berlin court rules that Google's AI summaries are a new search format, not original content
summary: The German court determines that AI Overviews do not infringe copyright by considering them part of the search engine.
